summary.zh: 一款融合技能成长、机关挑战与 Boss 战的霓虹像素横版动作游戏。
summary.en: A neon pixel action platformer built around skill progression, trap challenges, and boss battles.

description.zh: 使用 Unity 2022.3 与 C# 开发的 2D 像素横版动作游戏。玩家在多段霓虹城市关卡中完成奔跑、跳跃与战斗，通过二段跳、冲刺、爬墙和远程射击等能力跨越移动平台与机关，并收集资源、协同伙伴角色，最终进入 Boss 战。
description.en: A 2D pixel action platformer built with Unity 2022.3 and C#. Players move and fight through neon city stages, unlocking double jump, dash, wall climbing, and ranged attacks to cross moving platforms and hazards, collect resources, work with a companion, and reach the final boss encounter.

role.zh: 游戏玩法设计、Unity/C# 开发、角色控制与技能系统、关卡机关、敌人 AI 与 UI
role.en: Gameplay design, Unity/C# development, character controls and skills, level hazards, enemy AI, and UI

outcome.zh: 完成从开始界面、两段主关卡到结局场景的可玩流程，并实现技能解锁、对象池射击、收集系统、伙伴跟随与 Boss 战。
outcome.en: Completed a playable flow from start screen through two main levels and an ending scene, with unlockable skills, pooled projectiles, collectibles, companion behavior, and boss encounters.

alt.zh: Jump Pro Max 霓虹像素动作平台游戏主视觉海报
alt.en: Jump Pro Max neon pixel action platformer key visual

alt.zh: 角色使用二段跳穿越移动平台、齿轮与尖刺机关
alt.en: Hero double-jumping through moving platforms, gears, and spike traps

alt.zh: 角色与 Bringer of Death Boss 的最终战斗
alt.en: Final battle against the Bringer of Death boss

alt.zh: 雨夜霓虹城市中的浮空机关关卡
alt.en: Floating platform stage in a rainy neon city

alt.zh: 主角、伙伴角色、技能与收集物系统
alt.en: Hero, companion, skills, and collectible systems

alt.zh: Jump Pro Max 月夜城市与 Boss 剪影封面
alt.en: Jump Pro Max moonlit city and boss silhouette cover
